Formerly: MUSC699J.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 813

MUSC656 Jazz Arranging (3 Credits)

Comprehensive approach to jazz arranging, including chord scale theory, voicing techniques, part and score layout, and formal construction of an arrangement.

Prerequisite: MUSC655.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC656 or MUSC699N.
